1090: [Color:0xc]◆History of Tokyo & the Eastern Kingdom of Mikado[Color:0x0]
[Color:0x5]■Year 201X−Y[Color:0x0]
  * Defense Minister Tamagami makes 
  contact with a mysterious woman.
  * Demon Summoning Program 
  indiscriminately distributed
  throughout the world.
  * Defense Minister Tamagami founds
  Counter−Demon Force.
[Color:0x5] ―――――[Color:0x0]
  * Yamato Perpetual Reactor goes 
  out of control. Demons from the 
  Expanse flood the world.
  * The war later known as God's Plan 
  erupts.
  * Angels kidnap a large number of 
  children in a cocoon−like structure.
    −〉 Akira's sister is kidnapped at this time.
  * Akira joins the Counter−Demon Force.
  * Nuclear missiles are launched all.
  over the world.
    −〉 Tokyo is protected by a layer
of rock, God's Plan ends.
[Color:0x5] ――――― (80 years later, above the Ceiling)[Color:0x0]
  * Angels bring the cocoon above the
  Ceiling. The children are freed.
    −〉 The children start a new life 
above the Ceiling.
  * Akira and his friends begin tunneling
through the Ceiling.
    −〉 Digging begins at Sky Tower.
[Color:0x5] ――――― (300 years later, above the Ceiling)[Color:0x0]
  * Akira breaches the Ceiling.
    −〉 First encounter with the 
Angels of Death.
  * Angels of Death overwhelm Akira
and his colleagues, forcing them to
retreat.
    −〉 Akira makes an arrangement 
with Fujiwara and Skins
[Color:0x5] ――――― (Year 0, Gregorian calendar)[Color:0x0]
  * Akira founds the Eastern Kingdom 
  of Mikado above the Ceiling.
  * Fujiwara and Skins found the 
  Hunter Association.
  * Tayama founds the Ashura−kai.
[Color:0x5] ――――― (Year 13, Gregorian calendar)[Color:0x0]
  * Akira assassinated at Sky Tower.
  * Yuriko founds the Ring of Gaea.
  * An unknown person strips three 
  of the four archangels of their
  power and locks them in Kagome, 
  a spirit−sealing tower.
[Color:0x5]■Year 2023 (Year 346, Gregorian calendar)[Color:0x0]
  * Akira reincarnates ([Flynn] born)
    −〉 [Flynn] found as a baby at 
Sky Tower.
[Color:0x5]■Year 2028 (Year 750, Gregorian calendar)[Color:0x0]
  * Boss (Asahi's father) switches 
  from active Hunter duty to running
  the Kinshicho Hunter Association
  and tending bar.
[Color:0x5]■Year 2037 (Year 1474, Gregorian calendar)[Color:0x0]
  * Flynn is born.
  * [Flynn] becomes a Hunter Cadet.
[Color:0x5]■Year 2038 (Year 1492, Gregorian calendar)[Color:0x0]
  * Flynn becomes a Samurai (SMTIV).
  * [Flynn] graduates to full Hunter
status (SMTIV:A).
[END]
